requiredStatusChecks: Policy Matrix Validate / Validate policy matrix structure
Policy Settings Alignment / Validate policy and settings alignment
Policy Labels Alignment / Validate policy labels alignment
Release Readiness Gate / Validate release readiness policy
PR Title Policy / Validate PR title

Changelog Policy / Enforce changelog labeling policy

managedLabels.name: changelog:required
managedLabels.description: User-facing change should be reflected in changelog/release notes

managedLabels.name: changelog:skip
managedLabels.description: No changelog entry needed for this PR

managedLabels.name: risk:accepted
managedLabels.description: Explicitly accepted risk for large/high-impact change
